creator: rscheff@freebsd.org
text:
The tp->t_flags in the BT mentioned earlier here decodes to
6130 03F4
        TF_NODELAY
       TF_SENTFIN
       TF_REQSCALE
       TF_RCVDSCALE
       TF_REQ_TSTMP
      TF_RCVD_TSTMP
      TF_SACK_PERMIT
  TF_FASTRECOVERY
  TF_WASFRECOVERY
 TF_TSO
TF_CONGRECOVERY
TF_WASCRECOVERY

Is net.inet.tcp.rfc6675_pipe enabled? If yes, see https://reviews.freebsd.org/D29315
